data.title: About Us
data.content: A Community based philanthropic and development organization dedicated to sustainable poverty reduction

data.title: Vision, Mission, Goal, Objectives and Core values
data.content: DUS dreams the existence of a society free from all sorts of exploitation...
data.full_content:
Vision

DUS dreams the existence of a society free from all sorts of exploitation where everyone irrespective of class, creed and cast will enjoy equal rights...

Mission

Coastal areas of Bangladesh are regularly stricken by natural disasters...

data.title: Governance Structure
data.content: DUS believes in democratic practice and public-private participation...
data.full_content:
DUS believes in democratic practice and public-private participation to achieve its goal...

Executive Committee

data.title: Operational Areas of DUS
data.content: DUS primarily operates in the coastal regions of Bangladesh...
data.full_content:
DUS primarily operates in the coastal regions of Bangladesh, with a focus on Hatiya Island...

  • Hatiya Upazila
  • Subarnachar Upazila
  • Companyganj Upazila
  • Noakhali Sadar

data.title: Our Achievements
data.content: Over the years, DUS has achieved significant milestones...
data.full_content:
Over the years, DUS has achieved significant milestones in community development:

  • Successfully provided micro-credit to over 40,000+ group members
  • Empowered 97% female beneficiaries through financial inclusion
  • Established Community Radio for coastal communities

data.title: Legal Status and Organizational Affiliations
data.content: DUS is a registered organization with the Ministry of Social Services & Welfare...
data.full_content:
Legal Status

DUS is a registered organization with the Ministry of Social Services & Welfare and NGO Affairs Bureau...

Organizational Affiliations

DUS maintains affiliations with various national and international organizations including PKSF, CUP, ALRD...
